name: travel-simulator
description: Immersive travel simulator: onboarding + 3D globe (React/r3f) and a walkable Gaussian-splat town (three.js + Spark)

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n onboarding,world -c cyan,magenta "npm --prefix onboarding run dev -- --port 5173 --strictPort" "npm --prefix world run dev -- --port 5174 --strictPort"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix onboarding install && npm --prefix world install
